title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do you usually get your news – from TV, newspapers or online?
Do you think social media is a reliable source of information?
What type of programme or show do you enjoy watching most? Why?
Do you think we spend too much time looking at screens?
How often do you post things on social media?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think we can trust the news we read online?
Should social media companies be responsible for removing false information?
Do you think people are becoming more or less well-informed about world events?
